---
title: "Apple Music Classical on the Web"
description: "Classical music lovers, rejoice — Apple Music Classical is now available on the web."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-03-13"
categories: [Apple, Apple Music, classical music, music, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Apple Music Classical on the web. Image: Apple. ([Source](https://classical.music.apple.com/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Classical music lovers, rejoice! Apple Music Classical is now on the web!

<https://classical.music.apple.com/>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_apple-music-classical-web-player-activity-7306013998523592704-5U6a).*
